text: Metro: Delhi Metro. 393 km across NCR. 288 stations. Daily ridership: 60 lakh. Phases 1-4 (Phase 4 under construction). DMRC operated. Airport Express Line: 23 km. Connects Delhi, Gurgaon, Noida, Faridabad, Ghaziabad.

Metro: Mumbai Metro. 337 km planned (14 corridors). Currently Aqua Line (46 km) operational. Mumbai Metro Line 3 (Colaba-SEEPZ) 33 km underground. ₹1.3 lakh crore total investment. Will transform Mumbai's transit.

Metro: Bengaluru Namma Metro. 175 km planned. Purple and Green lines operational (69 km). Phase 2: 72 km under construction. Daily ridership: 8 lakh. ORR-Airport line approved. Connects major IT corridors.

Metro: Hyderabad Metro. 69 km operational. 57 stations. World's largest PPP metro project (L&T). Daily ridership: 5 lakh. Airport Metro Express under construction. Connects Miyapur-LB Nagar and Nagole-Raidurg.
Metro: Chennai Metro. Phase 1: 54 km operational. Phase 2: 119 km under construction. 96 total stations when complete. ₹63,246 crore investment for Phase 2. Connects 4 corridors across Chennai.
Metro: Pune Metro. 54 km across 3 lines. Phase 1: 33 km under construction/opening. Hinjewadi-Shivajinagar line (23 km) by Tata-Siemens PPP. ₹11,420 crore. PCMC to Swargate line partially open.
